# StethoScribe

> AI-powered clinic management and e-prescription platform built for Indian doctors. Voice-to-notes in any Indian language, WhatsApp prescription sharing, and integrated lab workflows.

StethoScribe helps clinics run their practice end-to-end — patient registration, appointments, doctor consultations with AI voice transcription, prescription generation and sharing, and connected diagnostic lab ordering and results.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview, features, and pricing.
- [Labs Directory](/labs): Browse diagnostic labs registered on StethoScribe.
- [Register Your Lab](/register-lab): Onboarding for diagnostic labs joining the network.

## Legal

- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): How we handle patient and clinic data under the DPDP Act 2023.
- [Terms of Service](/terms): Terms governing use of the StethoScribe platform.
- [Data Processing Agreement](/dpa): DPA terms for clinics as data controllers.
- [Security](/security): Security measures, incident response, and vulnerability reporting.
